lore.english:
Demon. A <Chimera> that was created by combining multiple demon cells.

Appearance-wise she looks like a child, but she is decades old. Her facial expression rarely changes, and although she is a cannibalistic demon that eats humans, she doesn't feed on them because she thinks human flesh is disgusting. She can eat anything she wants, but she likes to eat sweet stuff the most and hates meat that's been cooked medium-rare.

Because she was created by combining multiple demon cells, she naturally carries traits of multiple demons. Among them, her immortality is comparable to that of higher- ranked demons. She doesn't have the will to fight, and because of her immortality, she doesn't feel threatened. She can shapeshift parts of her body to use in her fights but be-cause she needs lots of energy, she becomes fatigued very easily.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Viktor's Wrath[-]
skills.description:
Lunges at the enemy with altered arms and slashes them.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:260102]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:260102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:260102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Randolf's Nightmare[-]
skills.description:
Consumes [&Color_Cyan][V3:260204]%[-] of own [&HP] to increase [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:260205]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
Rakes the ground with her nails and hurls a claw-shaped aura at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:260202]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:260202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:260202] turn(s)
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]5%[-], deals [&Common_Word_Skill_DeathDmg] at a fixed chance of [&Color_Cyan][R:260203]%[-].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Howard's Astound[-]
skills.description:
Transforms into a demon and rips the enemy to shreds.
Consumes [&Color_Cyan][V3:260304]%[-] of the character's [&HP] to increase [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:260305]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
If [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]70%[-] when attacking, [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:260302]%)[-].
If [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]40%[-] when attacking, [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalDamage] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:260303]%)[-].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Manmade Demon[-]
skills.description:
Recovers [&Color_Cyan][V3:260401]%[-] of Max. [&HP] when defeating an enemy.
When defeating an enemy, [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] fills [&Color_Cyan]([V3:260402]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:260402]%[-] chance.
The [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] of all of Noah's skills increase the lower the [&HP].
